name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 16 Oct 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are offering better privacy and more control over your API Keys."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, read ahead!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"API Keys - Privacy and Security Update","bold":true},{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The API Keys are now encrypted on the "},{"text":"API Keys","bold":true},{"text":" page, with only the last five characters of the original API Key being exposed for identification. Further, a date of creation section is added so you can easily sort through multiple API keys from a single place."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/api10.068J1000005ZJH6IAO.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/api10.068J1000005ZJH6IAO.png","name":"api10","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":939,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now maintain a list of whitelisted IP addresses, which can be shared with the Maropost servers in such a way that it allows only those IP addresses included in the list. Such whitelisting adds another layer of safety and mitigates the risk of misusing a user’s API keys."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/api14.068J1000005ZJ1jIAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/api14.068J1000005ZJ1jIAG.png","name":"api14","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":843,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For URL-based requests, you’ll need to insert the API key in the Authorization Header as depicted in the image below: "}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/api11.068J1000005ZJJTIA4.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/api11.068J1000005ZJJTIA4.png","name":"api11","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1086,"width":1532,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about creating and managing API Keys, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/API-Keys","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"API Keys","bold":true}]},{"text":". Also, see our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://api.maropost.com/api/","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"API Reference Guide","bold":true}]},{"text":" for an exhaustive list of the APIs offered."}]}]
